name: Vanta
description: Vanta — Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec tool for developers

seo.title: Vanta Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Vanta analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec.

lock_in.explanation: Medium — compliance evidence tied to to platform

when_to_use: SOC 2 Type II preparation and maintenance
when_not_to_use: Not targeting enterprise customers yet — SOC 2 is premature
Need ISO 27001 only — Drata may be cheaper
DIY compliance is sufficient for now

migration_cheatsheet.risk_notes: Medium — compliance evidence tied to to platform
migration_cheatsheet.tip: Moderate effort required. Export data before canceling

review.verdict: Best for soc 2 type ii preparation and maintenance. Vanta offers subscription from $10,000/year (Core). Moderate vendor lock-in.
pros: SOC 2 Type II preparation and maintenance
Integrates into CI/CD for developer-friendly security
cons: Not targeting enterprise customers yet — SOC 2 is premature
Need ISO 27001 only — Drata may be cheaper
False positives require developer triage time
review.best_for: SOC 2 Type II preparation and maintenance
